reasoning: 8x zoom reveals several hard AI tells. Most damning: the pink/rose spherical orb elements scattered across the sheet use smooth radial gradients rather than 2-3 hard pixel tones — a direct style mismatch with the main medallion which uses proper indexed pixel art. This gradient-vs-flat inconsistency is a classic AI mixing artifact. Second, the canvas has numerous floating isolated pixel clusters (single blue pixels, stray pink dots, unanchored mini-sprites) that serve no clear semantic purpose and strongly suggest AI generation spillover. Third, outline weight is inconsistent: the main large medallion has clean 1px dark outlines, but many surrounding smaller elements have fuzzy or missing outlines entirely. Fourth, the smaller box-shaped UI sprites in the lower half have detail that is visually 'melted' — pixel boundaries are ambiguous at this zoom level. Fifth, the overall layout of the sprite sheet is disorganized with no clear grid alignment between elements, suggesting the AI laid out assets without a coherent structure. The main medallion heart sprite itself is the strongest part and shows reasonable pixel art discipline, but the surrounding generated context fails multiple checks.
